---
title: "About Me"
---

::: {.about-hero}

![](assets/Graduation.jpg){.profile-img}

::: {.intro-card}

## Hi, I’m Alina Chen 👋

I am a Boston University graduate student with a background in **marketing, business analytics, market intelligence, and international business**.

I enjoy turning fragmented information into clear insights that help teams better understand markets, customers, and growth opportunities.

:::

:::

## Snapshot

::: {.fact-row}

::: {.fact-box}
<i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot"></i>

### Boston

Current Location
:::

::: {.fact-box}
<i class="fa-solid fa-graduation-cap"></i>

### Boston University

Graduate Student
:::

::: {.fact-box}
<i class="fa-solid fa-globe"></i>

### Global Perspective

Asia · Europe · U.S.
:::

::: {.fact-box}
<i class="fa-solid fa-chart-line"></i>

### Career Focus

Analytics & Strategy
:::

:::

## What I Bring

::: {.service-grid}

::: {.service-card}
<i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass-chart"></i>

### Market Intelligence

Researching industries, competitors, and market signals to support better business decisions.
:::

::: {.service-card}
<i class="fa-solid fa-bullhorn"></i>

### Marketing & Growth

Connecting customer insights with campaigns, outreach, and measurable engagement.
:::

::: {.service-card}
<i class="fa-solid fa-database"></i>

### Data-Driven Thinking

Using analytical tools to organize information, identify patterns, and communicate findings clearly.
:::

:::

## Technical Skills

::: {.skill-grid}

::: {.skill-card}
<i class="fa-brands fa-python"></i>  
**Python**
:::

::: {.skill-card}
<i class="fa-solid fa-database"></i>  
**SQL**
:::

::: {.skill-card}
<i class="fa-solid fa-file-excel"></i>  
**Excel**
:::

::: {.skill-card}
<i class="fa-solid fa-chart-line"></i>  
**Tableau / Power BI**
:::

::: {.skill-card}
<i class="fa-solid fa-bullhorn"></i>  
**Digital Marketing**
:::

::: {.skill-card}
<i class="fa-solid fa-users"></i>  
**CRM**
:::

::: {.skill-card}
<i class="fa-solid fa-magnifying-glass-chart"></i>  
**Market Research**
:::

::: {.skill-card}
<i class="fa-solid fa-lightbulb"></i>  
**Strategy**
:::

:::

## Journey

::: {.timeline}

### France 🇫🇷

Studied international business and developed a global perspective.

### Professional Experience

Worked across marketing, sales, consulting, and business development environments.

### Boston University 🇺🇸

Expanded into analytics, market intelligence, visualization, and data-driven strategy.

### Future

Building a career that connects customer understanding, market research, and business impact.

:::
